Class SubscribersReportController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.ReportController
Controllers.SubscribersReportController
public class SubscribersReportController extends ReportController
Controller for generating and displaying subscriber reports in the UI. Extends ReportController and requests a subscriber report from the server based on the current report session's month and year.

  • Field Summary

    barChart, reportTitle

  • Method Details

    • getReportType

      protected ReportType getReportType()
      Returns the type of report this controller handles.
      Specified by:
      getReportType in class ReportController
      Returns:
      ReportType.SUBSCRIBERS

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Calls the superclass initialize method and requests the subscriber report from the server for the current month and year.
      Overrides:
      initialize in class ReportController
